---
title: "Sports Business Research Network (SBRnet)"
page-layout: article
---

# Sports Business Research Network (SBRnet)

## Description

Sports market research platform with consumer, industry, participation, sponsorship, and expenditure data. Supports sports business, marketing, and consumer behavior research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, News & Media
- **Data/resource type:** Market Research, Data Platform
- **Access model:** Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Market Research, Data Platform

## Links

- [Access resource](https://yale.idm.oclc.org/login?url=https://sportsmarketanalytics.com)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
